1255 Sixth Street

Charming single family home near downtown Lakeport with updated interiors, a bright living room, mature trees, and a fenced rear garden for entertaining.

About this home

The kitchen opens to the dining area and the primary suite has generous closet space. Outdoor patios and established landscaping make the home ready for weekend gatherings.

Neighborhood

Close to lake access, schools, shops, and local services while still offering a quiet residential setting.
